case_title: HENRY TRIEU VS. PAUL LOONSBURY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S), OBTAIN ANSWER(S), ENTER DEFAULT(S), OR WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE JUL-30-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2014 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CASTRO, RAMIRO RODRIGUEZ SUBSTITUTED FOR RICE, HARRY EDGAR AS ATTORNEY FOR TRIEU, HENRY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-09-2014 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRIEU, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT LOONSBURY, PAUL LOONSBURY, EMILY DOE ONE DOE TWO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-18-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-27-2014

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RAMIRO RODRIGUEZ CASTRO, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-09-2014, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2014. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-10-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
